epics.title: Payment Gateway Integration
epics.description: Integration with a payment gateway (Stripe) for credit card payments, subscription management, and payment event handling

stories.title: As a customer, I want to make credit card payments, so that I can purchase products and services
stories.description: Integrate Stripe payment gateway for secure credit card transactions
acceptance_criteria: The system successfully processes a credit card payment and updates the order status
The system handles declined payments and displays a user-friendly error message

tasks.title: Setup Stripe payment gateway API
tasks.description: Configure Stripe API keys, setup payment intent, and handle payment method creation

tasks.title: Implement credit card payment form and validation
tasks.description: Create a secure payment form, validate user input, and handle payment submission

tasks.title: Integrate payment processing with order management
tasks.description: Update order status, handle payment confirmation, and trigger relevant notifications

stories.title: As a customer, I want to manage my subscriptions, so that I can easily update or cancel my recurring payments
stories.description: Implement subscription management features using Stripe's subscription API
acceptance_criteria: The system allows customers to update their subscription plans and billing information
The system cancels subscriptions and notifies customers when requested

tasks.title: Implement subscription plan creation and management
tasks.description: Create and manage subscription plans, including pricing, billing cycles, and trial periods

tasks.title: Develop subscription update and cancellation functionality
tasks.description: Allow customers to update their subscription plans, pause or cancel subscriptions, and handle relevant notifications

tasks.title: Integrate subscription webhooks for payment event handling
tasks.description: Handle Stripe webhook events for subscription updates, cancellations, and payment failures

stories.title: As a system administrator, I want to receive payment event notifications, so that I can monitor and respond to payment-related issues
stories.description: Implement payment event handling, receipt generation, and email notifications
acceptance_criteria: The system generates receipts for successful payments and sends them to customers
The system notifies administrators of payment failures, declines, or other relevant payment events

tasks.title: Develop payment receipt generation and email notification
tasks.description: Create a receipt template, generate receipts for successful payments, and send them to customers via email

tasks.title: Implement payment event handling and notification system
tasks.description: Handle payment events, such as payment failures or declines, and notify administrators via email or dashboard notifications

tasks.title: Integrate payment event logging and analytics
tasks.description: Log payment events, track payment metrics, and provide insights for system administrators

epics.title: User Authentication System
epics.description: A comprehensive system for user authentication, including login, signup, password reset, and OAuth integration

stories.title: As a user, I want to login to the system using email and password, so that I can access the application
stories.description: The system should allow users to login using their email and password, and authenticate them successfully
acceptance_criteria: The system should validate the user's email and password and authenticate them successfully
The system should handle incorrect email or password and display an error message
The system should redirect the user to the dashboard after successful login

tasks.title: Implement email and password validation
tasks.description: Create a function to validate the user's email and password

tasks.title: Create a login form and handle form submission
tasks.description: Design a login form and handle form submission using JavaScript and HTML

tasks.title: Integrate with the authentication API
tasks.description: Integrate the login form with the authentication API to authenticate users

stories.title: As a user, I want to signup for an account, so that I can use the application
stories.description: The system should allow users to signup for an account using their email and password
acceptance_criteria: The system should validate the user's email and password during signup
The system should send a verification email to the user after signup
The system should redirect the user to the login page after successful signup

tasks.title: Create a signup form and handle form submission
tasks.description: Design a signup form and handle form submission using JavaScript and HTML

tasks.title: Implement email verification during signup
tasks.description: Create a function to send a verification email to the user after signup

tasks.title: Integrate with the user management API
tasks.description: Integrate the signup form with the user management API to create a new user

stories.title: As a user, I want to reset my password, so that I can recover my account
stories.description: The system should allow users to reset their password using their email
acceptance_criteria: The system should send a password reset email to the user
The system should allow the user to reset their password using the password reset link
The system should update the user's password successfully

tasks.title: Create a password reset form and handle form submission
tasks.description: Design a password reset form and handle form submission using JavaScript and HTML

tasks.title: Implement password reset email sending
tasks.description: Create a function to send a password reset email to the user

tasks.title: Integrate with the password management API
tasks.description: Integrate the password reset form with the password management API to update the user's password

stories.title: As a user, I want to login using OAuth, so that I can access the application using my social media accounts
stories.description: The system should allow users to login using their social media accounts using OAuth
acceptance_criteria: The system should redirect the user to the OAuth authorization page
The system should handle the OAuth callback and authenticate the user
The system should redirect the user to the dashboard after successful OAuth login

tasks.title: Implement OAuth authorization flow
tasks.description: Create a function to redirect the user to the OAuth authorization page

tasks.title: Handle OAuth callback and authenticate the user
tasks.description: Create a function to handle the OAuth callback and authenticate the user

tasks.title: Integrate with the OAuth API
tasks.description: Integrate the OAuth login with the OAuth API to authenticate users

epics.title: Email Notification System
epics.description: A system for sending transactional emails to users for important events

stories.title: As a user, I want to receive a welcome email when I sign up, so that I can verify my email address and start using the application
stories.description: The system should send a welcome email to new users with a verification link
acceptance_criteria: The welcome email is sent to the user's registered email address within 1 minute of signing up
The welcome email contains a unique verification link that expires after 24 hours
The user's email address is marked as verified when the verification link is clicked

tasks.title: Implement email template for welcome email
tasks.description: Create a template for the welcome email with placeholders for user name and verification link

tasks.title: Integrate with SendGrid to send welcome emails
tasks.description: Use SendGrid API to send the welcome email to new users

tasks.title: Test welcome email functionality
tasks.description: Test the welcome email functionality with different user scenarios

stories.title: As a user, I want to receive a password reset link when I forget my password, so that I can reset my password and regain access to my account
stories.description: The system should send a password reset link to the user's registered email address
acceptance_criteria: The password reset link is sent to the user's registered email address within 1 minute of requesting a password reset
The password reset link expires after 1 hour and can only be used once
The user's password is updated successfully when the password reset link is used

tasks.title: Implement password reset email template
tasks.description: Create a template for the password reset email with a placeholder for the password reset link

tasks.title: Generate and send password reset link via email
tasks.description: Generate a unique password reset link and send it to the user's registered email address

tasks.title: Test password reset functionality
tasks.description: Test the password reset functionality with different user scenarios

stories.title: As a user, I want to receive payment receipts for my transactions, so that I can keep a record of my payments
stories.description: The system should send a payment receipt to the user's registered email address after a successful transaction
acceptance_criteria: The payment receipt is sent to the user's registered email address within 1 minute of a successful transaction
The payment receipt contains the transaction amount, date, and payment method
The payment receipt is in a format that can be easily printed or saved by the user

tasks.title: Implement payment receipt email template
tasks.description: Create a template for the payment receipt email with placeholders for transaction details

tasks.title: Integrate with payment gateway to send payment receipts
tasks.description: Use the payment gateway API to send the payment receipt to the user's registered email address

tasks.title: Test payment receipt functionality
tasks.description: Test the payment receipt functionality with different transaction scenarios

stories.title: As an administrator, I want to configure email templates and settings, so that I can customize the email notification system
stories.description: The system should allow administrators to configure email templates and settings
acceptance_criteria: The administrator can upload and manage email templates
The administrator can configure email settings such as sender name and email address
The administrator can test email templates and settings

tasks.title: Implement email template management interface
tasks.description: Create an interface for administrators to upload and manage email templates

tasks.title: Implement email settings configuration interface
tasks.description: Create an interface for administrators to configure email settings

tasks.title: Test email template and settings management functionality
tasks.description: Test the email template and settings management functionality with different administrator scenarios

epics.title: Admin Dashboard
epics.description: A dashboard for internal team to manage users, monitor the platform, and view analytics

stories.title: As an admin, I want to manage users, so that I can control access to the platform
stories.description: User management capabilities to create, update, and delete users
acceptance_criteria: The system allows admins to create new users with unique usernames and passwords
The system allows admins to update existing user information
The system allows admins to delete users and prevent further access
The system prevents duplicate usernames and validates password strength

tasks.title: Design and implement user management database schema
tasks.description: Create database tables for user information and access control

tasks.title: Develop user management UI components
tasks.description: Create React components for user creation, update, and deletion

tasks.title: Implement user management API endpoints
tasks.description: Create RESTful API endpoints for user CRUD operations

stories.title: As an admin, I want to view analytics dashboards, so that I can monitor platform performance
stories.description: Analytics dashboards to display key metrics such as active users, revenue, and system performance
acceptance_criteria: The system displays active user metrics in real-time
The system displays revenue metrics in real-time
The system displays system performance metrics such as response time and error rate
The system allows admins to filter and drill down into specific metrics

tasks.title: Integrate with analytics service to collect metrics
tasks.description: Set up analytics service to collect and process metrics data

tasks.title: Design and implement analytics dashboard UI
tasks.description: Create UI components to display key metrics and allow filtering and drill-down

tasks.title: Develop API endpoints to fetch and update metrics
tasks.description: Create RESTful API endpoints to fetch and update metrics data

stories.title: As an admin, I want to monitor system health, so that I can identify and resolve issues
stories.description: System health monitoring to display error logs, system performance, and other key metrics
acceptance_criteria: The system displays error logs in real-time
The system displays system performance metrics such as CPU usage and memory usage
The system allows admins to filter and search error logs
The system sends notifications to admins when system health thresholds are exceeded

tasks.title: Set up system health monitoring tools
tasks.description: Configure system health monitoring tools to collect and process metrics data

tasks.title: Develop system health monitoring UI components
tasks.description: Create UI components to display system health metrics and error logs

tasks.title: Implement notification system for system health thresholds
tasks.description: Set up notification system to send alerts to admins when system health thresholds are exceeded

stories.title: As an admin, I want to configure platform settings, so that I can customize the platform to meet our needs
stories.description: Configuration management to allow admins to customize platform settings
acceptance_criteria: The system allows admins to configure platform settings such as theme and layout
The system allows admins to configure user roles and permissions
The system allows admins to configure integrations with third-party services
The system validates and saves configuration changes

tasks.title: Design and implement configuration management database schema
tasks.description: Create database tables to store configuration settings

tasks.title: Develop configuration management UI components
tasks.description: Create UI components to allow admins to configure platform settings

tasks.title: Implement configuration management API endpoints
tasks.description: Create RESTful API endpoints to fetch and update configuration settings

stories.title: As an admin, I want to view real-time analytics, so that I can make data-driven decisions
stories.description: Real-time analytics to display key metrics such as active users, revenue, and system performance
acceptance_criteria: The system displays real-time analytics data
The system allows admins to filter and drill down into specific metrics
The system updates analytics data in real-time
The system handles high volumes of analytics data

tasks.title: Set up real-time analytics service
tasks.description: Configure real-time analytics service to collect and process metrics data

tasks.title: Develop real-time analytics UI components
tasks.description: Create UI components to display real-time analytics data

tasks.title: Implement real-time analytics API endpoints
tasks.description: Create RESTful API endpoints to fetch and update real-time analytics data
